issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases for API failures or missing data.
The skill assumes a Node.js environment and uses fetch, limiting cross-platform compatibility.

scenarios.name: add-lead-with-enrichment
scenarios.rationale: Response A meets the required POST request and body but omits enrichment details and response JSON, while Response B uses incorrect endpoints and lacks the required statements.

scenarios.name: setup-icp-webhook
scenarios.rationale: Response B covers most rubric items but misses the ClayWebhook interface reference and filter_matched trigger, whereas Response A lacks the required checks, interface reference, and JSON response.
